project_name: Safe Closure and Rehab. of Disposal Site
Safe Closure and Rehab. of Disposal Site (Perimeter Fence)
remarks: Completed | Validated/Unliquidated. The fund transfer was used in the construction of fence, leachate pond and for soil cover as the dumpsite is still used as an open dumpsite. They are practicing dump-cover on residuals. The Municipality has already allocated 1M with 400K from DENR-EMB for the construction of an MRF at their new site while they will close the old dumpsite.

project_name: Safe Closure and Rehab. of Disposal Site (Perimeter Fence)
remarks: Completed | Validated/Unliquidated/Fund transfer was used in the construction of Residual Container Area. Plastics are delivered to the Recyling Facility of Villar and recycled into plastic school chairs.

project_name: Safe Closure and Rehab. of Disposal Site (Perimeter Fence)
remarks: Not Implemented | The land used as dumpsite is leased by the Municipality from a private owner. The owner. The lease agreement will end 2019 so the Municipality did not implement the project as they were looking for a new site to transfer. Recent development talk with the owner of the land and the Mayor arrived to an agreement that the Municipality will buy the land from the owner and continue development of the dumpsite.

project_name: Safe Closure and Rehab. of Disposal Site (Perimeter Fence)
remarks: Not Implemented | The original location of the proposed dumpsite is Brgy. Bangladan, however, during the conduct of the public hearing, the stakeholders of brgy. Bangladan protested on the dumpsite to be located in their barangay. The Municipality proceeded to transfer the proposed dumpsite to Brgy. Tugra-ao, Miag-ao. Currently, the materials for construction was already delivered and is being held for safekeeping at the old slaughterhouse and will be relocated at the dumpsite once construction of leachate pond will proceed.

project_name: Safe Closure and Rehab. of Disposal Site (Perimeter Fence)
remarks: Completed | Validated/Liquidated   The completed project (fencing) is not properly maintained. It is damage due to presence of stray animals and scavengers. The site is within the Quarry are and it is practicing open pit dumping.

project_name: Safe Closure and Rehab. of Disposal Site
remarks: Completed | Validated/unliquidated        Fencing (cyclone wire and steel pipes) are still in good condition though vines and shrubs are growing through it. The segregation facility is already dilapidated. Garbage are not properly segregated though the area is small. No personnel is manning the facility at the time of site visit.

project_name: Safe Closure and Rehab. of Disposal Site
remarks: Completed | Validated/unliquidated       Fencing and Segregation Facility is well maintained. There are personnel segregating the garbage at the time of visit, the facility is using mechanized shredder and conveyor. The facility is also producing vermin compost available for sale.
